name: Tobacco Onions
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and slice the onions thinly, then separate into rings.
2. Mix the flour and seasonings in a bowl.
3. Heat the canola oil in a deep, heavy pan or deep-fryer to about 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
4. Dredge each onion ring in the seasoned flour, shaking off excess, and fry until golden brown. Fry in small batches at a time to prevent the rings from sticking together; avoid dredging the rings before frying as they may release too much moisture.
5. Drain on paper towels. Keep warm until all onions are finished cooking. Serve immediately.
